name: HttpRunner
what_it_does: Open-source testing framework supporting API testing (HTTP/WebSocket/RPC), vision-driven UI automation (Android/iOS/browser via OCR/CV), and load testing. Includes MCP server for AI-assisted test orchestration and an interactive chat mode.
use_cases: API testing across HTTP, HTTP2, WebSocket, and RPC protocols
Cross-platform UI automation using vision-driven approach (OCR/CV)
Load testing with distributed horizontal scaling
AI-assisted test creation via MCP server integration
Mobile app testing on Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS
not_for: Users wanting a GUI test builder
best_when: You need a unified framework covering API, UI, and load testing with AI assistance, especially for Chinese-language teams or cross-platform mobile testing.
avoid_when: Your team needs English documentation, you only need API OR UI testing (not both), or you prefer established ecosystem tools like Playwright for browser testing.

auth.notes: No authentication required. CLI tool with local execution.

pricing.notes: Apache-2.0 license. Free and open source.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Documentation is primarily in Chinese. MCP server capabilities are briefly mentioned but not well documented. CLI help available.
known_agent_gotchas: Documentation is primarily in Chinese with minimal English
MCP server is a subcommand (hrp mcp-server) with sparse documentation
Vision-driven UI testing adds OCR/CV overhead
Go binary distribution - limited plugin extensibility
v5 with LLM features appears to be evolving rapidly

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
